name: For the Elegant Set (Menu & Recipes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare red caviar canapes: Mix onion juice, lemon juice, and cream cheese in a pastry tube. Form a crown on each toast round. Fill the center with caviar and decorate edges with chopped chives.
2. Make strawberry surprises: Gouge out stems from strawberries to expose hollow centers. Place in a container and sprinkle powdered sugar. Add rum, vodka, Triple Sec, and gently mix until well combined. Refrigerate for at least 2 days before serving cold in pre-chilled crystal bowls.
3. Prepare Fondue Bourguignonne: Cut beef tenderloin into bite-sized pieces. Pour peanut oil into a fondue dish or chafing dish until at least 3 inches deep. Heat to about 360°F (175°C) until it will cook a test piece of meat in three minutes. Cook the meat in the hot oil using fondue forks marked with colored dots. Serve cooked meat with various elegant sauces.
4. Make Meat Dip Sauces:
- Mock Bernaise: Whisk tarragon vinegar, mayonnaise, shallots, dry mustard, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
- Anchovy: Combine anchovy paste with mayonnaise.
- Garlic Cream: Blend softened butter with minced garlic.
- Curry: Mix curry powder, garlic powder, lemon juice, and beef gravy.
- Mustard: Whisk together mayonnaise, sour cream, dry mustard, tarragon vinegar, and salt.
